overview: West Coast Men's Health provides evidence-based medical care for men's health concerns related to aging, hormone balance, circulation, and nerve health. Services are delivered in a clinical setting under the direction of Dr. Jonathan Hodor with a focus on safety and individualized treatment planning.
highlights: Multiple TRT delivery methods (injections, gels, pellets)
Acoustic Wave Therapy for erectile dysfunction and neuropathy
targetAudience: Men experiencing age-related changes in energy, sexual function, hormone balance, or overall well-being.
